case_title: BARBARA K WEINBERG et al VS. ELLEN C ROSS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-13-2007 CONTINUED TO AUG-31-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE (RE COMPLAINT)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-22-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ELLEN ROSS' MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED BASED ON FACTS ALLEGED AND THE HOLDING IN WOOLSTROM V MAILLOUX (1983) 141 CAL. APP. 3D 1, 5. COURT ORDERS THE PHRASE "ACTED IN A SUICIDAL MANNER" STRICKEN FROM THE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ARBITRATOR DARREL CAMERON HORSTED APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-29-2007 THROUGH JAN-27-2008.
